config.enabled.name: Enable Mod
config.enabled.desc: Enable or disable automatic Fairy Dust usage.
config.max-per-second.name: Max Uses Per Second
config.max-per-second.desc: Maximum number of Fairy Dust uses per second. Prevents performance issues.
config.cooldown.name: Machine Cooldown
config.cooldown.desc: Minimum seconds between Fairy Dust uses on the same machine.
config.connectors.name: Connector Items
config.connectors.desc: Comma-separated list of floor/path items that extend connectivity.
config.toggle-overlay-key.name: Toggle Overlay Key
config.toggle-overlay-key.desc: Key to toggle the debug overlay on/off.
config.show-overlay.name: Show Overlay
config.show-overlay.desc: Whether the debug overlay is visible.
